rationale: The proposed homestead exemption increase under Tax Code §11.13(b) has no relationship to Educ. Code §12.022, which governs minimum voter turnout for home-rule school district charter elections. No overlap in subject matter.
quote: An election on the adoption of a proposed home-rule school district charter has no effect unless at least 25 percent of the registered voters of the district vote in the election in which the adoption of the charter is on the ballot.
_note: No conflict; rule_text concerns home-rule school district charter election turnout, unrelated to homestead exemption amounts.
